summary: Backend: 14/14 pytest cases pass for /api/health, /api/experts (list, category, q, sort, categories, detail+404) and /api/auth (register, duplicate, login ok/401, /me with+without bearer, logout invalidates). Frontend /experts: 25 cards render, Design & UX filter narrows to 5, detail page /experts/{id} loads, sort/search work. Signup navigates to /dashboard successfully. Signin succeeds at backend level (cookie set, user avatar visible in nav) but URL stays on /signin — DashboardPage appears to redirect back on first render before useSession has the fresh user (React warning 'Cannot update a component (Transitioner) while rendering DashboardPage'). Sign-out UI is not reachable from the avatar in the nav.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking the user avatar ('A Alice'/'T Test' chip) does not open a dropdown. There is no visible Sign out control anywhere in the UI, so users cannot log out from the browser. Playwright waited 30s for any 'Sign out' text to become visible — none found.

After a successful POST /api/auth/login (cookie set, /api/auth/me returns user, avatar renders in nav), navigate({to:'/dashboard'}) fires but DashboardPage immediately bounces the user back to /signin. React console warning: 'Cannot update a component (Transitioner) while rendering a different component. DashboardPage … DashboardPage'. Signup works because it hits dashboard after the auth store is already hydrated; signin has a race where DashboardPage runs a redirect during render before useSession reflects the freshly-issued session.

integration_issues.issue: Session is actually established (cookie present, avatar + name render in header) but the user ends up back on /signin, breaking the expected 'navigate to /dashboard on success' requirement.

issues: Console emits '[CONVEX FATAL ERROR] Couldn\'t parse deployment name placeholder' on /signup and /dashboard because VITE_CONVEX_URL is still the placeholder. Out of scope per problem statement but should be cleaned up in the next iteration to stop noise and the Transitioner-in-render warning likely stems from a Convex-wired page component.

action_items: Fix signin → /dashboard navigation so the user actually lands on /dashboard (likely: make DashboardPage wait for useSession loading flag instead of redirecting when user is momentarily null, or rely on AuthProvider to hydrate before navigate fires).
Wire the avatar/user chip in Layout to a dropdown (or add a visible Sign out button) that calls signOutUser and clears the session. Currently there is no way for an end user to log out from the UI.

Clean up the legacy Convex initialization path so the '[CONVEX FATAL ERROR] Couldn\'t parse deployment name placeholder' stops appearing on pages that no longer need it (at least gate ConvexProvider behind a real URL env).
critical_code_review_comments: src/pages/ExpertsPage.tsx still depends on the legacy Expert shape (e.title, e.skills, e.responseTime); the mapping is handled in src/lib/api.ts, but keep an eye that both shapes stay in sync — a refactor to one canonical type is recommended.
Layout.tsx: missing visible sign-out affordance (HIGH). The avatar should be a DropdownMenu trigger with Dashboard/Sign out items, each with data-testid.
Sign-in flow: DashboardPage gates on `user === null` but that value is transiently null right after login. Gate on `isLoading === false && user === null` instead.
Add data-testid attributes on: signin-submit, signup-submit, user-menu-trigger, user-menu-signout, expert-card, category-pill-{id}, sort-select. Most are missing today, making E2E tests brittle.
seed_data_creation: Seed experts run in previous iteration — 25 experts confirmed present via GET /api/experts. Test users created with prefix 'test_<random>@worksoy.com' are left behind (no cleanup endpoint available).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers health, experts filtering/sorting/detail, and full auth lifecycle — run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Frontend E2E: re-test /signin → /dashboard redirect after fix, and verify the user menu opens with a Sign out item. The avatar is rendered (top-right), confirmed visible in screenshots, but is not a menu trigger yet.
rca_of_the_issue: Signin-redirect bug RCA: when SignInPage calls navigate({to:'/dashboard'}) right after await signInWithEmail, AuthProvider must have already updated useSession to the authenticated user. Evidence: (1) session_token cookie is set and backend /api/auth/me returns 200, (2) the nav avatar renders the correct user name (e.g., 'A Alice'), (3) URL ends back at /signin and React logs a setState-in-render warning originating from DashboardPage. This strongly indicates DashboardPage performs a synchronous redirect to /signin while user is still falsy, causing the transitioner to update mid-render. Fix: gate DashboardPage's redirect behind a loading flag (only redirect when loading===false && user===null), or have AuthProvider expose a hydrated promise that SignInPage awaits before navigating.
